summary: A vertical (9:16) montage set to music titled '365 Days of President Donald J. Trump' with animated text callouts. Fast cuts move between Trump seated before a row of world flags ('STRONG GLOBAL RELATIONSHIPS'), color-graded Marines on a wire obstacle, Trump walking through a flag-draped Rose Garden, a White House event captioned 'No Men In Women's SPORTS,' and a fireworks shot reading 'MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.' There is no speech; the audio is a music bed.

script.scene: Trump seated at a table in front of a row of world flags (German, Italian, Ukrainian, UK); large blue animated text overlay 'STRONG GLOBAL RELATIONSHIPS.' No talking (music bed).
Color-graded shot of US Marines in helmets and packs working a concertina-razor-wire obstacle in the dirt.
Trump in a long dark overcoat walking across a stage in the White House Rose Garden, flanked by American flags and tulips; slow-motion.
Interior White House hallway with chandelier and flags as a group walks toward camera down a red carpet; yellow animated text 'No Men In Women's SPORTS.'
Back-of-head shot of Trump and a woman watching a wall of fireworks/lights; centered serif text 'MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN' to close.

notable_text: On-screen kinetic text: 'STRONG GLOBAL RELATIONSHIPS', 'No Men In Women's SPORTS', 'MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN'. Tweet: '365 DAYS OF PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP. A Golden Age just getting started.'
